title: Por ellas aunque mal paguen
writer: Juan Bustillo Oro, Augusto Martínez Olmedilla
actors: Fernando Soler, Pedro Infante, Ángel Infante
plot: Mr. Anastacio, an aristocrat who is going through a bad patch, marries his daughter Isabel to a wealthy rancher. Isabel and her family refuse to work, so Jose Manuel takes them to the ranch, where they are forced to work to be abl...
